NATRule.Name: Default SNAT IPv4
NATRule.Description: Auto created IPv4 SNAT MASQ rule for traffic from "ANY" inbound interface to WAN outbound interface. Updated automatically with WAN interface changes.

IPSPolicy.Name: lantowan_strict
IPSPolicy.Description: A Strict policy for LAN to WAN Traffic

IPSPolicy.Name: lantowan_general
IPSPolicy.Description: A General policy for LAN to WAN Traffic

IPSPolicy.Name: dmzpolicy
IPSPolicy.Description: A General policy to scan traffic flowing to DMZ

IPSPolicy.Name: WAN TO DMZ
IPSPolicy.Description: A default IPS policy template to scan the traffic flowing from WAN to DMZ; Primarily intended to secure server(s) hosted in the DMZ

IPSPolicy.Name: WAN TO LAN
IPSPolicy.Description: A default IPS policy template to scan the traffic flowing from WAN to LAN; Primarily intended to secure server(s) hosted in the LAN

IPSPolicy.Name: DMZ TO LAN
IPSPolicy.Description: A default IPS policy template to scan the traffic flowing from DMZ to LAN; Primarily intended to secure server(s) hosted in the LAN zone

IPSPolicy.Name: DMZ TO WAN
IPSPolicy.Description: A default IPS policy template to scan the traffic flowing from DMZ to WAN; Primarily intended to secure the DMZ-based client(s)

IPSPolicy.Name: LAN TO DMZ
IPSPolicy.Description: A default IPS policy template to scan the traffic flowing from LAN to DMZ; Primarily intended to secure the LAN-based client(s) and DMZ-based server(s)

IPSPolicy.Name: LAN TO WAN
IPSPolicy.Description: A default IPS policy template to scan the traffic flowing from LAN to WAN; Primarily intended to secure LAN-based client(s)

WebFilterPolicy.Name: No Web Mail or Chat
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Deny access to web mail and online chat sites

WebFilterPolicy.Name: No Web Mail
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Deny access to web mail sites

WebFilterPolicy.Name: No Online Chat
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Deny access to online chat sites

WebFilterPolicy.Name: No web uploads
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Restrict users from uploading content to any site

WebFilterPolicy.Name: Default Workplace Policy
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Deny access to categories most commonly unwanted in professional environments

WebFilterPolicy.Name: No Explicit Content
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Deny access to sexually explicit sites

WebFilterPolicy.Name: No Ads or Explicit Content
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Deny access to advertisements and sexually explicit sites

WebFilterPolicy.Name: No Games Ads or Explicit Content
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Deny access to games, advertisements, and sexually explicit sites

WebFilterPolicy.Name: Default Policy
WebFilterPolicy.Description: A typical starter policy with options suitable for many organizations

WebFilterPolicy.Name: Deny All
WebFilterPolicy.Description: All user web activity will be blocked

WebFilterPolicy.Name: CIPA Compliance
WebFilterPolicy.Description: Deny categories necessary for compliance with the Children's Internet Protection Act

QoSPolicy.Name: Streaming Video - Limit to SD Quality
QoSPolicy.Description: Attaching the policy to applications restricts the bandwidth available to the defined SD video streaming limit.

QoSPolicy.Name: Streaming Video - Limit to HD Quality
QoSPolicy.Description: Attaching the policy to applications restricts the bandwidth available to the defined HD video streaming limit.

QoSPolicy.Name: Streaming Video - Limit to Full HD Quality
QoSPolicy.Description: Attaching the policy to applications restricts the bandwidth available to the defined Full HD video streaming limit.

QoSPolicy.Name: Streaming Video - Guarantee SD Quality
QoSPolicy.Description: Attach the policy to applications to allocate guaranteed bandwidth that corresponds to SD video streaming requirement.

QoSPolicy.Name: Streaming Video - Guarantee HD Quality
QoSPolicy.Description: Attach the policy to applications to allocate guaranteed bandwidth that corresponds to HD video streaming requirement.

QoSPolicy.Name: Streaming Video - Guarantee Full HD Quality
QoSPolicy.Description: Attach the policy to applications to allocate guaranteed bandwidth that corresponds to Full HD video streaming requirement.

QoSPolicy.Name: VoIP Guarantee
QoSPolicy.Description: Attach the policy to the firewall rule to allocate guaranteed bandwidth that corresponds to VOIP traffic requirement.

QoSPolicy.Name: Extremely Limited User
QoSPolicy.Description: Attaching the policy to a user restricts bandwidth for the user to very low levels.

QoSPolicy.Name: Moderate Limited User
QoSPolicy.Description: Attaching the policy to a user restricts bandwidth for the user to moderate levels.

QoSPolicy.Name: Lightly Limited User
QoSPolicy.Description: Attach the policy to a user to lightly limit bandwidth available to the user.

QoSPolicy.Name: Extremely Limited Rule
QoSPolicy.Description: Attaching the policy to a firewall rule limits bandwidth available to very low levels.

QoSPolicy.Name: Moderate Limited Rule
QoSPolicy.Description: Attaching the policy to a firewall rule limits bandwidth available to moderate levels.

QoSPolicy.Name: Lightly Limited Rule
QoSPolicy.Description: Attach the policy to lightly limit bandwidth available for the firewall rule traffic.

QoSPolicy.Name: Low Guarantee User
QoSPolicy.Description: Applying the policy to a user guarantees minimum bandwidth to the user even during network congestion.

QoSPolicy.Name: Moderate Guarantee User
QoSPolicy.Description: Applying the policy to a user guarantees average speed to the user at all times.

QoSPolicy.Name: High Guarantee User
QoSPolicy.Description: Applying the policy to a user guarantees high bandwidth allocation to the user.

QoSPolicy.Name: Low Guarantee Rule
QoSPolicy.Description: Applying the policy to a firewall rule guarantees minimum bandwidth even during network congestion.

QoSPolicy.Name: Moderate Guarantee Rule
QoSPolicy.Description: Applying the policy to a firewall rule guarantees average speed at all times.

QoSPolicy.Name: High Guarantee Rule
QoSPolicy.Description: Applying the policy to the firewall rule guarantees high bandwidth allocation.
